get.description: Root endpoint.
Health check endpoint.
List all strategies.
Get a specific strategy with all versions.

delete.description: Delete a strategy (soft delete - mark as inactive).

post.description: Create a new version of a strategy.

get.description: Get a specific strategy version with files.
List all files in a strategy version (without content for performance).

post.description: Create a new file in a strategy version.

get.description: Get a specific file with full content.

put.description: Update a file's content in a strategy version.

delete.description: Delete a file from a strategy version.

post.description:
Validate a strategy version's code.

Checks for:
- Syntax errors
- Forbidden imports/operations
- Required interface implementation (BaseStrategy)
- Security issues

get.description: List all available strategy templates.

Get a strategy template by ID.

Available templates:
- "basic": Simple single-file template
- "advanced": Multi-file template with indicators
- "wyckoff": Wyckoff method template

post.description:
Create and enqueue a new backtest run.
The backtest will be executed asynchronously by a worker.

get.description: List backtest runs with optional filtering.
Get a specific backtest run with results and per-asset metrics.

delete.description: Delete a backtest run and all associated data.

get.description: Get the result of a backtest run.
Get all trades from a backtest run.
Get metrics for a specific asset in a backtest.
Get trades for a specific asset in a backtest.

post.description:
Trigger WebSocket-based execution for a backtest run.
Used when custom CLI arguments are provided.

get.description: Get summary of all available market data.

List all available market datasets.

Optionally filter by symbol and/or timeframe.
Get list of all available currency pair symbols.

Get list of available timeframes.

Optionally filter by symbol.

Get market data for a specific symbol and timeframe.

Returns OHLCV candlestick data.
Get information about a specific dataset.

Get current authenticated user.
NOTE: Authentication not implemented in v1. Placeholder endpoint.

Get all portfolios for the user.

Returns portfolios ordered by default first, then by creation date (newest first).

post.description:
Create a new portfolio.

If this is the user's first portfolio, it will automatically be set as default.

get.description: Get portfolio by ID.

put.description:
Update portfolio details (name and description).

Balance cannot be updated through this endpoint. Use deposit/withdraw endpoints instead.

delete.description:
Delete portfolio (soft delete - marks as inactive).

Cannot delete the default portfolio. Set another portfolio as default first.

post.description:
Deposit funds to portfolio.

Amount must be positive.

Withdraw funds from portfolio.

Amount must be positive and cannot exceed current balance.

put.description:
Set portfolio as default.

This will unset any existing default portfolio for the user.
